summary: Executed backend + frontend regression and new-feature validation for local market intelligence, suppliers, WhatsApp ingestion, estimate enhancements, reports, and navigation on public preview URL.

ui_bugs.issue: Route renders empty-state card without a stable page-level data-testid when estimate is absent (only materials-empty-state-card), which reduces selector consistency for nav/page checks.

issues: Repeated Recharts console warning: width(-1)/height(-1) during chart mount on route transitions.

action_items: Standardize BOQ page-level data-testid for both empty and populated states.
Stabilize chart container sizing/mount timing to remove width(-1)/height(-1) warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: No backend 500s reproduced on /api/projects, /api/estimate, market/supplier/whatsapp endpoints in this run.
Codebase generally follows env-based URL usage and excludes Mongo _id from API responses in tested paths.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ supplier records, market-source entries, WhatsApp-ingested supplier record, and TEST_ project entries via API/UI tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL tested: https://civeng-calc.preview.emergentagent.com. Added backend regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_market_supplier_whatsapp.py (market settings/rates, supplier ingestion, trend, contractor comparison, whatsapp parser, projects schema). Pytest result: 13/13 pass.
rca of the issue: Chart warning RCA: Recharts components render while container dimensions are transient/invalid during route/layout transitions, producing width(-1)/height(-1) warnings; likely mount timing/layout measurement issue rather than API failure.
